
| Workflow | Purpose |
| - | - |
| auto-format-and-tidy.yml | `clang-format`, `clang-tidy` and push the updated source code |
| call-jenkins-benchmark-expose.yml | Webhook trigger to let the Jenkins worker run and log the benchmarks |
| create-engine-release.yml | Build and upload the engine's github release |
| tests.yml | Run unit tests |
| update-online-doxygen.yml | Webhook trigger to let Jenkins build and publish the doxygen documentation |
